## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## How

Summary of implementation approach.

## Testing

How was this tested?

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Manual verification

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style (no frameworks, no CDN, vanilla JS)
- [ ] No telemetry/analytics/external calls added
- [ ] No Chinese-origin dependencies added
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
